memoryArtifacts.headline: Biographical Wikipedia Article
memoryArtifacts.description:
Sir James de Audley [Knight], Justiciar of Ireland (1220-1272, sometimes known as Aldithel or Alditheley), was an English baron and magnate.[1][2]

zh.lifeSummary: 當James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland於1220年出生在英國英格蘭斯塔福爾李時，他的父親Henry De Audley45歲，母親Bertrade Mainwaring23歲。他於1244年與Ela Fitzwalter在英國英格蘭維爾爾索爾茲伯里結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。他於1270年被列為office of justiciar in ireland。他去世於1272年6月11日在愛爾蘭享年52歲。

nameMeanings.name: de
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Dilip, Anirban, Gopal, Alok, Anindya, Arunava, Asit, Asok, Dibyendu, Goutam, Indra, Indranil.

variants.name: Dey
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Indian Ashit, Indu, Naina, Partha, Soumya, Ajit, Anjan, Anjana, Anup, Arjun, Arun, Ashim.
English, Scottish, and Welsh: variant of   Day  .
German: topographic name from a field name in North Rhine-Westphalia, denoting a sizeable piece of land, from Middle Low German dē ‘thigh’ (referring to the shape of the property).

nameMeanings.name: Audley
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: habitational name from Audley in Staffordshire, named from the Old English female personal name Aldgȳth + Old English lēah ‘woodland clearing’.

nameMeanings.name: James
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: form of the name borne in the New Testament by two of Christ's disciples, James son of Zebedee and James son of Alphaeus. This form comes from Late Latin Iacomus, a variant of Iacobus, Latin form of Greek Iakobos. This is the same name as Old Testament Jacob (Hebrew Yaakov), but for many centuries now they have been thought of in the English-speaking world as two distinct names. In Britain, James is a royal name that from the beginning of the 15th century onwards was associated particularly with the Scottish house of Stewart: James I of Scotland ( 1394–1437 ; ruled 1424–37 ) was a patron of the arts and a noted poet, as well as an energetic ruler. King James VI of Scotland ( 1566–1625 ; reigned 1567–1625 ) succeeded to the throne of England in 1603 . His grandson, James II of England ( 1633–1701 ; reigned 1685–8 ) was a Roman Catholic, deposed in 1688 in favour of his Protestant daughter Mary and her husband William of Orange. From then on he, his son (also called James), and his grandson Charles (‘Bonnie Prince Charlie’) made various unsuccessful attempts to recover the English throne. Their supporters were known as Jacobites (from Latin Iacobus), and the name James became for a while particularly associated with Roman Catholicism on the one hand, and Highland opposition to the English government on the other. Nevertheless, it has since become one of the most perennially popular boys' names.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

historicEvents.title: 100 Years of Conflict Between England and France Ends
historicEvents.description: Treaty of Paris was signed on December 4, 1259, which ended 100 years of conflict between England and France.

en.lifeSummary: When James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland was born in 1220, in Leigh, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom, his father, Henry De Audley, was 45 and his mother, Bertrade Mainwaring, was 23. He married Ela Fitzwalter in 1244, in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. In 1270, his occupation is listed as office of justiciar in ireland. He died on 11 June 1272, in Ireland, at the age of 52.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland est né en 1220, à Leigh, Staffordshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Henry De Audley, avait 45 ans et sa mère, Bertrade Mainwaring, avait 23 ans. Il a épousé Ela Fitzwalter en 1244, à Salisbury, Wiltshire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. En 1270, sa profession de son indiquée est office of justiciar in ireland. Il est décédé le 11 juin 1272, à Irlande, à l’âge de 52 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland 1220 in Leigh, Staffordshire, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war sein Vater Henry De Audley 45 und seine Mutter Bertrade Mainwaring 23. Er hat 1244 in Salisbury, Wiltshire, England, United Kingdom Ela Fitzwalter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn. 1270 ist sein Beruf als office of justiciar in ireland aufgeführt. Er starb am 11. Juni 1272 im Alter von 52 Jahren in Irland.

it.lifeSummary: Quando James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland è nato il nel 1220 nel Leigh, Staffordshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, il suo padre, Henry De Audley, aveva 45 anni e il suo madre, Bertrade Mainwaring, aveva 23 anni. Lui sposato Ela Fitzwalter nel 1244, nel Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio. Nel 1270, la sua occupazione è indicata come office of justiciar in ireland. Morì il 11 giugno 1272, nel Irlanda, all'età di 52 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: James de Audley Justiciar of Irelandが1220年にイギリスイギリススタフォードシュアイアレイグで生まれた時，父Henry De Audleyは45歳，母Bertrade Mainwaringは23歳であった。1244年にイギリスイギリスウィルトシュアイアサリスブリーでEla Fitzwalterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子の親であった。1270年，職業はoffice of justiciar in irelandと記録されている。彼は1272年6月11日にアイルランドで52歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland(이)가 1220년 영국 잉글랜드 스태퍼드실르 리에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Henry De Audley(은)는 45세였고, 그의 어머니 Bertrade Mainwaring(은)는 23세였다. 그는 1244년 영국 잉글랜드 윌츠히르 살리스버이에서 Ela Fitzwalter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 1270년, 그의 직업은 office of justiciar in ireland이었다. 그는 1272년 6월 11일 아일랜드에서 52세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland nasceu em 1220, em Leigh, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Henry De Audley, tinha 45 anos e sua mãe, Bertrade Mainwaring, tinha 23 anos. Ele casou-se com Ela Fitzwalter em 1244, em Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho. Em 1270, sua profissão aparece como office of justiciar in ireland. Ele faleceu em 11 de junho de 1272, em Irlanda, com 52 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland родился в 1220 г. в местности лиг, стаффордшир, Англия, Великобритания, его отцу по имени Henry De Audley было 45 лет, а матери, которую звали Bertrade Mainwaring, 23. Он женился на женщине по имени Ela Fitzwalter в 1244 г. в местности салисбури, уилцхир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. В 1270 году он работал по профессии office of justiciar in ireland. Он умер 11 июня 1272 г. в местности Ирландия в возрасте 52 лет.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando James de Audley Justiciar of Ireland nació en 1220, en Leigh, Staffordshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, su papá, Henry De Audley, tenía 45 años y su mamá, Bertrade Mainwaring, tenía 23 años. Se casó con Ela Fitzwalter en 1244, en Salisbury, Wiltshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 1 hijo. En 1270, su ocupación registrada era office of justiciar in ireland. Murió el 11 de junio de 1272, en Irlanda, a la edad de 52 años.
